const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281372 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000});

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|court listener|case law|citation|federal court/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate by salience|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|Second Circuit|Paid|IFP|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.scotus_cert_terms // .cert_terms // empty' metrics/statpack.json | head -120","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.sections[] | {name, title, scope, rows: (.rows | length)}' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.terms | type, length' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation 'Merit Management Group, LP v. FTI Consulting, Inc.' --limit 10","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);
{"cell_id": "21", "max_tokens": 30000, "yield_time_ms": 20000}

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && git status --short && test ! -e data/cases/scotus/73281372/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z; printf '%s\\n' $?","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"out=data/cases/scotus/73281372/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z
find "$out" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
jq empty "$out/prediction.json" "$out/tooling.json"
sed -n '1,260p' "$out/prediction.json"
sed -n '1,320p' "$out/reasoning.md"
sed -n '1,260p' "$out/retrieval.md"
sed -n '1,260p' "$out/tooling.json"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);
